name: Blob Terrarium Portrait
description: Generate a natural history–style portrait from a labeled blob terrarium. Set up your terrarium with named creatures, capture it, then run this workflow.

params.prompt: Write a short, vivid 2-sentence description of {{params.creatures}} living in a {{params.environment}}. Focus on their appearance, personality, and how they interact. Make it whimsical and imaginative.

{{params.art_style}} portrait of {{params.creatures}} in a {{params.environment}}. {{concept.text}} Soft organic rounded blob-like bodies, vibrant colors, detailed background. Museum quality illustration.
Wide establishing shot: {{params.art_style}} scene of a {{params.environment}} habitat inhabited by blob-like {{params.creatures}}. Rich environmental storytelling, atmospheric lighting, lush detail.
